name: The Hunt for the Crown
description: Three shards of the shattered crown are hidden in the dungeon. Collect them all to weaken the Vampire Lord.

objectives.description: Collect all 3 Crown Shards from defeated Boss Monsters

specialRules.effect: Assign shards to 3 random boss monsters in the deck

introText: The Crown of Ravenloft was shattered long ago. Its pieces still hold great power. Recover them to turn the tide.
victoryText: The crown is whole once more. You feel its weight and the destiny it carries.
defeatText: The shards remain hidden, and the Vampire Lord mocking your failure.
